ai_contract.matched_ablation: The AI treatment appends every syntactically valid, non-duplicate, value-blind factor program to the identical numerical model. It uses the same rows, targets, costs, seeds, calibration, policy, and replay as the baseline.
ai_contract.required_runtime_evidence: A hash-bound local runtime benchmark must identify the exact model, GPU backend, memory use, and latency before AI factors are generated.
ai_contract.time_moe_status: research-only until a pinned 2.4B checkpoint passes DirectML compatibility, deterministic replay, random-walk forecast skill, and bounded-latency gates on this host
ai_contract.uplift_rule: AI must improve predictive proper scores and paired after-cost stress economics without worse drawdown, concentration, tail loss, or temporal stability. A mixed result fails.

chronological_roles.evaluation: 2023-06-09 through 2023-06-14 UTC; consumed development evidence only
chronological_roles.policy_calibration: 2023-06-07 through 2023-06-08 UTC; both days must pass separately
chronological_roles.role_boundary_rule: Every feature, placement, queue window, fill, path quote, exit, and target must finish inside one role. Side and action support are purged independently.

claims.reason: The source interval has been repeatedly inspected and is selection-contaminated. This is a mechanism screen only.

data_contract.event_source: Official Binance Data Vision USD-M daily archives
data_contract.feature_version: l1-tape-aggregate-depth-causal-v9 plus frozen action-specific queue and exponential-flow features
data_contract.historical_depth_limit: The source contains L1 BBO, exact trades, and sampled aggregate percentage-band depth. It is not order-level L2 and cannot prove queue position.

economic_screen.non_overlap: At most one open position or outstanding order per symbol; a passive order must be filled, cancelled, or expired before another action for that symbol.
economic_screen.policy_selection: Choose one frozen coverage only on policy calibration after both calibration UTC days pass independently. Evaluation cannot choose or repair a threshold.
economic_screen.stress_replay: Reprice the exact selected base ledger without reselecting actions using doubled placement/protection latency, maker entry cost raised to the observed taker cost, and two additional basis points of slippage per executed side.

execution_contract.aggressive_entry: After 750 ms placement latency, cross the observed ask for long or bid for short, subject to quote age and 10% displayed-L1 participation.

historical_cost_contract.warning: These frozen development costs are not a live account quote. Paper/testnet/live runtime must query and record signed account commission rates per symbol and use the worse valid rate when evidence is missing.

passive_entry.fill_price: placement bid for long and placement ask for short
passive_entry.full_fill_threshold: initial displayed L1 queue ahead plus complete bot order quantity
passive_entry.matching_prints: Long uses buyer_is_maker=true prints exactly at the placement bid; short uses buyer_is_maker=false prints exactly at the placement ask.

execution_contract.stop_and_take: Reuse the causal 1.5x/2.25x volatility barriers bounded to 18-80 bps stop and 30-120 bps take; exits cross the contemporaneous opposite BBO.

external_pre_design_evidence.selection_rule: Choose the shortest probed expiry with at least 10% full-fill support for both sides of every symbol; no economics were inspected.

candidates.role: Matched taker-only control using the same causal state and aggressive targets.
Shared action-conditioned fill-survival, conditional-payoff, and lower-tail model.
Matched treatment appending only governed value-blind AI factor programs.
A simple residual temporal benchmark, run only after target and tree predictive gates pass; complexity receives no presumption of superiority.

model_contract.decision_value: Passive value equals calibrated fill probability times calibrated conditional after-cost payoff. Aggressive value is calibrated after-cost payoff. Abstain has exactly zero value.
model_contract.fill_survival: Discrete conditional hazards for complete fill in (0,5], (5,10], and (10,15] seconds plus right-censored no-fill, evaluated by log loss, Brier score, calibration, and integrated Brier skill.
model_contract.payoff_heads: Conditional mean and 20th-percentile exact after-cost payoff given complete fill, plus post-fill 5/15-second adverse-selection diagnostics.
model_contract.shared_action_rows: Every state produces paired long/short and passive/aggressive rows with action-aligned features; no independent score scales are allowed.

objective: Determine whether conservative queue-censored passive entry improves executable after-cost action value over the rejected taker-only path without hiding non-fills or adverse selection.

predecessor_evidence.finding: Round 56 improved pooled rank diagnostics but both treatments failed positive top-quintile payoff after the frozen 16 bps stress charge; no economic replay was authorized.

economic: Policy calibration aggregate and each constituent UTC day must be positive under base and paired stress before evaluation is interpreted.

Evaluation requires at least 30 non-overlapping closed trades, two positive symbols, bounded concentration, positive base and stress return, profit factor above one, and drawdown no greater than 100 bps.
No leverage, annualized ROI, promotion, or live authority is permitted by this screen.
numerical: Every archive manifest, feature row, target, model, prediction, calibration object, action, order lifecycle, and cash flow is finite and hash-bound.
Every passive full fill is reproducible from initial L1 queue, own size, matching trade IDs, prices, quantities, and timestamps; cancellations never count as fills.
All models reload exactly and OpenCL/DirectML paths record backend identity and CPU fallback explicitly.
predictive: Positive fill log-loss and integrated-Brier skill versus chronological prevalence for both passive sides of every symbol.
Positive conditional-payoff MSE and pinball skill plus minimum Spearman 0.02 for both passive sides of every symbol.
The top calibrated action-value quintile must exceed the bottom quintile and be positive after frozen costs on policy calibration before replay.
At least two of three symbols and both long/short pooled sides must retain positive rank association in evaluation.

research_basis.use: Fill time is a censored survival target and should be evaluated with proper scores.
Live Binance BTC perpetual evidence requires joint fill-probability and post-fill adverse-selection modeling.
Queue state and order-flow intensities motivate queue-aware execution features.
High forecast scores do not establish complete actionable transactions.
Simple LOB-adapted baselines remain mandatory controls for complex temporal models.
Official checksum-verified USD-M BBO and trade archives provide the historical source of record.
